name: implicit means only resolution is blocked without gates

source.purpose: Legacy no-gate threads still block successful closure when criteria require a final action and evidence only shows obtaining the means.

thread_spine.title: Clear the Forty-Thousand Hold
thread_spine.resolutionCriteria: The hold is cleared when the release chip is processed and the clamp releases.

narrator.prose: Lira passes over the release chip, but the clamp has not released yet.

transitions.reason: The release chip was obtained, but the clamp has not released yet.
